steps: Tissue homogenization
Electrophoresis and transfer
Homogenise samples in 150 µL ice-cold lysis buffer (1% Triton X-100 in 0.1 M phosphate buffered saline solution, pH 7.6 , supplemented with protease and phosphatase inhibitors.
Centrifuge samples 14000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes
Mix 4 µg samples in Laemmli sample buffer supplemented with 5 % beta-mercaptoethanol.
Heat samples 95 °C 00:05:00

Separate samples (4 µg total protein) by polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis using precast Bolt™ 4-20% Bis-Tris, 1.0 mm, Mini Protein Gels at 120 V 01:20:00 or until dye front reaches the bottom of the gel. Run with pre-stained size markers
Soak nitrocellulose membrane (pore size: 0.2 µm) with Towbin buffer (see materials)

Soak transfer sandwich components (2 sheets of filter paper and 2 blotting pads) in Towbin transfer buffer and assemble in the transfer cassette in the following order: cathode plate 1 x blotting pad 1 x filter paper gel nitrocellulose membrane 1 x filter paper 1 x pad Use a roller to remove any air bubbles
Place cassette in transfer tank and transfer protein onto 0.2 µm nitrocellulose membranes (300 mA, 01:30:00 in cold Towbin buffer.
Rinse membranes with TBS 00:00:30
Visualize ECL stained membrane using a BioRad ChemiDoc™.
Incubate membrane with ECL 00:00:30
Wash with TBS-T 00:05:00, 4x
Incubate membrane with peroxidase-conjugated goat anti-mouse and goat anti-rabbit IgG in TBS-T (1:5000 each). 00:00:00, RT
Wash with TBS-T 00:05:00, 4x
Incubate membranes in blocking solution containing mouse anti-α-synuclein (1:1000; RRID:AB_398108) and rabbit anti-β-actin (1:1000; RRID:AB_2305186) 18:00:00 Room temperature
Block non-specific binding sites with blocking solution (TBS-T: TBS containing 2% BSA and 0.05 % Tween-20) for 01:00:00
Immunodetection of protein bands
Transfer supernatants into pre-cooled test tubes.
Measure protein concentration (e.g. BCA method).
creator: Pietro La Vitola
